name: linz
description: Read New Zealand property, title, ownership and parcel data from the LINZ Data Service (LDS) WFS API. Includes finding owners who hold more than one property title. Note: LINZ data does not classify properties as commercial vs residential — that lives in council/QV rating data.

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help_text: Create a key at https://data.linz.govt.nz/my/api/. To read ownership data (layer-50805) the key must have accepted the LINZ Licence for Personal Data on your LINZ account.

find_multi_property_owners.description: Find owners who appear on more than one property title. Scans the NZ Property Titles Including Owners layer within a scoping filter (owner name and/or land district), splits the concatenated owners field, and aggregates distinct titles per owner. A scoping filter is required — the layer is national and cannot be scanned in full. Note: LINZ cannot label a property commercial vs residential; estate_description is returned so you can infer property type.

owner_name.description: Owner name or fragment to scope and group by (e.g. a surname or company name). Case-insensitive substring match against the title owners field.

land_district.description: Land district to scope the scan to (e.g. 'North Auckland', 'Canterbury', 'Otago'). Exact match.

min_properties.description: Minimum number of distinct titles an owner must hold to be returned. Defaults to 2.

max_titles_scanned.description: Maximum number of title records to scan (safety cap, max 10000). Defaults to 2000. If the result is truncated, narrow the filter or increase this.

status.description: Optional title status filter. CQL is case-sensitive; use the LDS value 'LIVE'.

cql_filter.description: Optional raw CQL filter ANDed with the other filters, for advanced scoping.

owners.description: Owners holding at least min_properties distinct titles, sorted by property_count descending.

search_property_titles.description: Search NZ property titles (including owners) by owner name, title number, land district or status. Returns title records with the owners field, estate description and registration details.

owner_name.description: Owner name or fragment (case-insensitive substring match against the owners field).

land_district.description: Land district, e.g. 'North Auckland', 'Canterbury'. Exact match.

status.description: Title status. CQL is case-sensitive; use the LDS value 'LIVE'.

cql_filter.description: Optional raw CQL filter ANDed with the other filters.

limit.description: Maximum number of titles to return. Defaults to 100.

get_title_owners.description: Get the owners and details of a single property title by its title number.

title_no.description: The title number to look up, e.g. 'NA123A/456'.

search_parcels.description: Search NZ primary parcels by appellation (legal description), associated title number, parcel intent or land district. Returns parcel descriptors useful for property context.

appellation.description: Legal description fragment, e.g. 'Lot 1 DP 12345' (case-insensitive substring match).

title_no.description: Title number to find associated parcels for (substring match against the parcel's titles field).

parcel_intent.description: Parcel intent (tenure type), e.g. 'Fee Simple Title', 'Road', 'Hydro'. Exact, case-sensitive match. Note: this is tenure, not land use — it does not indicate commercial vs residential.

cql_filter.description: Optional raw CQL filter ANDed with the other filters.

include_geometry.description: Include the parcel geometry (large) in results. Defaults to false.

limit.description: Maximum number of parcels to return. Defaults to 100.

query_layer.description: Run a raw WFS GetFeature query against any LINZ Data Service layer or table. Escape hatch for data not covered by the typed actions (e.g. street addresses, geodetic marks, owner-centric ownership tables). Supply a layer id and an optional CQL filter.

layer.description: LDS layer or table id, e.g. '50805', 'layer-50805' or 'table-50806'.

cql_filter.description: CQL filter expression, e.g. "land_district = 'Otago'". Filters and values are case-sensitive (use ILIKE for case-insensitive text matching).

sort_by.description: Field to sort by, optionally with '+D' for descending, e.g. 'issue_date+D'.

srs_name.description: Spatial reference for returned geometry, e.g. 'EPSG:4326' or 'EPSG:2193'.

include_geometry.description: Include feature geometry in results. Defaults to false.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return. Defaults to 100.
